category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes MPlayerShell as an improved visual experience for MPlayer on OS X.
source_facts.description says improved visual experience for MPlayer on macOS.
display_name_sources: source_facts.repo and homepage use MPlayerShell capitalization.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the best documentation surface for this project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/lisamelton/MPlayerShell; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
